nuggets.headline: pete rango's "savage planet" features a consistent collaborator
nuggets.text: The 2022 album *Savage Planet*, which includes "Oms at Play," features Xmane on all three of its tracks. This collaboration extends across the entire project, with Xmane appearing on "Oms at Play," "Traag Park," and "Planet X."

nuggets.headline: "oms at play" arrived as part of pete rango's 2022 album
nuggets.text: The track you're hearing, "Oms at Play," is the opening song from Pete Rango's 2022 album, *Savage Planet*. The album itself consists of three tracks, all of which feature the artist Xmane.

source.title: Download Pete Rango album songs: Savage Planet | Boomplay Music
source.quoteSnippet: Savage Planet is a music album released in 2022. Savage Planet has 3 songs sung by Pete Rango. 1 Oms at Play ft. Xmane

nuggets.headline: pete rango also teamed up with mavi taylor on the 2022 single "say it"
nuggets.text: If you're digging Pete Rango's sound, you should check out Mavi Taylor. Pete Rango collaborated with Mavi Taylor on the single "Say it," which was also released in 2022. Their joint track highlights a shared artistic space you might want to explore further.

source.quoteSnippet: Say it - Mavi Taylor • Say it•2022•2:21 • Artist: Mavi Taylor, Pete Rango

artistSummary: Pete Rango is an artist who has been releasing music steadily since 2021, with a catalog that includes singles, EPs, and the 2022 album "Savage Planet." He frequently collaborates with other artists, notably Xmane and Mavi Taylor.
